name: SVN2 Indoor Golf Woodland Hills
about: SVN2 Indoor Golf Woodland Hills is a premium golf training facility utilizing industry-leading TrackMan technology in a private, self-service setting. Located on Ventura Blvd, it provides a focused environment designed for serious golfers looking to improve their game through detailed swing analysis and performance metrics. The venue operates on a flexible model, offering hourly pay-as-you-go sessions, memberships for frequent players, and various booking options to accommodate different schedules and budgets.
why_golfers_like_it: Instant, detailed swing feedback with TrackMan technology
Private, distraction-free bays for focused practice
Flexible hours from early morning to late night
Pay-per-session or membership options for various budgets
Ability to bring your own food and drinks

food_and_drink.notes: Patrons are permitted to bring their own food
Patrons are permitted to bring their own drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-leading simulators providing detailed swing metrics and instant feedback

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue provides all necessary equipment; however, players are welcome to bring their own clubs if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, patrons are permitted to bring their own food and drinks into the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an exact duration, but it mentions playing simulated rounds on championship courses and focused training sessions.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the facility is tailored for proficient golfers and does not mention child-friendly features or activities.
